title: Allow time to be imported from Excel
excerpt: Our vendors submit data to us via an excel template which we then upload to our board. Allowing the date column to include the time when uploading data via excel would be hepful!

posts.author: natalie.fortman (Natalie)
posts.cookedHtml: Our vendors submit data to us via an excel template which we then upload to our board. Allowing the date column to include the time when uploading data via excel would be hepful!
